revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-275

A working platform which may be towed to a desired position, where supports are extended to the seabed in order to support and raise the platform above the water.

{{IALAFooter}}
